body:
## Problem
Users can accidentally close the tab while an auto-save is pending.

## Impact
- Data loss
- Poor error prevention (Heuristic #5)

## Tasks
- [ ] Listen for the `beforeunload` event when `SaveStatus === 'saving'`
- [ ] Trigger a native browser confirmation dialog: "Your changes may not be saved."
- [ ] Ensure the event listener is removed when saving is complete or idle
title: [UX-07] Add "Unsaved Changes" Browser Interruption
